blurb: Destruction Warlock is TBC's endgame caster king: Shadow Bolt machine-gunning with the Improved Shadow Bolt debuff feeding every other warlock's damage too. The spec's phase curve is the steepest in the game — mediocre in Karazhan gear, untouchable in Sunwell. This Phase 4 snapshot aggregates 327 top DPS parses from Zul'Aman; the highest-consensus pick is Bracers of Nimble Thought at 99% usage.
statPriorityRationale: Shadow Bolt spam with Improved Shadow Bolt debuff uptime rewards crit unusually well, and by late phases destruction becomes the highest-ceiling caster in the game — the list leans damage-crit over regen because fights end before mana does.

faq.question: Where does Destruction Warlock Phase 4 BiS come from?
faq.answer: From the gear worn by 327 top-ranked Destruction Warlock DPS parses on Warcraft Logs during Phase 4 (Zul'Aman), aggregated per slot — what high parsers actually equip, not a spreadsheet ideal.

faq.question: What are the highest-consensus Destruction Warlock items in Phase 4?
faq.answer: Bracers of Nimble Thought (99%), Gloves of the Malefic (99%), Hood of the Malefic (98%). When an item sits above ~70% among top parsers, treat it as the priority drop to chase.

faq.question: Should I follow this list exactly for Phase 4?
faq.answer: Use it as a loot-priority guide, not a checklist — expand each slot's alternatives, because second-choice items are often within a few percent and drop from entirely different bosses in Zul'Aman.
